initial_hypothesis_for_improvement_teach.rationale: Both GDPval failures completed with reward 0.0 and no platform error. Until QA proves a task/grader defect, the first safe intervention is a general work-product workflow prompt that teaches file inspection, spreadsheet generation, and verification discipline.

validation_plan: Run student-v1 on one_deal_ai_workflow_business as a non-regression check.
Exclude or rerun save_the_account_routing_bug if hosted session-detach repeats.
If GDPval reward improves, run QA Evaluator false-positive/reward-hacking checks before promotion.
promotion_rule: Accept student-v1 only if completed-run GDPval reward improves over student-v0, one_deal does not regress, invalid hosted runs are excluded or rerun, and QA Evaluator finds no false positive or reward hacking.
